source_case.citation: Illustrative clinical scenario modeled on family-history documentation patterns described in general internal medicine case discussions (e.g., Harrison's Principles of Internal Medicine, 21e, family history section). Synthetic content does not reproduce any real case.

review_note: HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED before commit. Clinical content must be verified as: (1) medically plausible, (2) free of real patient data, (3) free of specific treatment protocols.
